title: Suki Gifts International - Small Orange Tarantula Spider - Spindra (14276)
features: Soft boa black tarantula spider with orange accents
Available in other sizes and colourways
description: Product Description Vibrant, colourful and oh so cute - meet supersoft plush Spindra Tarantula from Suki Gifts. Premium quality bright orange and black soft boa plush spider with big adorable golden brown eyes under oversized eyelids. Approximately 17cm in length. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends in different colours and styles also available in the Li’L Peepers range of Turtles, Dragons, Farmyard, Jungle and other animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Directions Hand wash and air dry Box Contains 1 x Tarantula Spider Sml See more
